subject: [OOF] Update slicing_config.yaml
commit_message:
[OOF] Update slicing_config.yaml

Slicing_config.yaml file has to be properly aligned in Istanbul version

Issue-ID: OOM-2916
Signed-off-by: Maciej Lisowski <m.lisowski2@partner.samsung.com>
Change-Id: I9b9129212f71369cd4e36fdf5c9b762e74638090

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4552/ : FAILURE

The line in commit is too long: it has a size of 140 instead of 80 characters maximum.

Line in cause: Slicing_config.yaml file has to be properly aligned in Istanbul version. Mapping has changed and needed to be updated for usecase to succeed ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4552/ )

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4552/ )
